block_reason: No incomplete Phase 19 prerequisite can be upgraded: operational composition, current executed rights, exact schemas, coverage, decision-calendar geometry, market calibration, data-specific policy inputs, and a source-bound untouched holdout remain absent or unproven.

construction_dependency_groups.definition: Require operational composition, delivery, schemas, and current executed use rights.
Require declared point-in-time coverage, calendar, availability, and missingness semantics.
Require complete non-synthetic signal, feature, chronology, selection, leakage, and quality inputs.
Require market-calibrated costs, stress, regimes, promotion gates, and risk limits.
Preserve the audit schema and require exact source-bound label-blind holdout governance.
Require an independent joint policy-and-holdout approval record after all inputs complete.

construction_gates.definition: Block until operational composition, exact delivery, and current executed rights are evidenced.
Block until point-in-time coverage, calendar, availability, and missingness are frozen.
Block until evaluation methodology inputs are complete and approved as non-synthetic.
Block until market calibration, stress, regime, promotion, and risk inputs are complete.
Block until source-bound label-blind holdout governance is frozen before observation access.
Block until an independent joint approval record exists after every predecessor gate passes.

disclaimer: Portable input register only. INPUTS_FROZEN proves deterministic requirements and transition rules; it is not an operational selection, policy, holdout definition, qualification, data right, research authorization, performance result, execution clearance, or order authority.

forbidden_substitutes.definition: A requirements hash proves specification integrity only.
A blocked-assessment hash proves only assessment integrity.
Synthetic dates, thresholds, calibrations, and results cannot be relabeled.
Public metadata and blocked rights findings do not grant operational use.
Candidate inventory selection is review routing, not operational composition.
A protocol or template cannot substitute for a completed source-bound instance.
Placeholder and all-zero values are never valid evidence.
No operator override or arbitrary expected hash can bypass construction gates.

input_requirements.definition: Require one independently approved operational capability-to-source/product composition before any policy or holdout can be complete.
Require current executed agreement and revocation evidence for the exact selected legal entity, products, delivery, and intended use.
Require exact selected delivery and schema versions plus temporal and instrument-identity field mappings.
Require pre-observation target history, calendar, availability, revision, validity, and missingness conventions.
Require a non-synthetic deterministic research-score, action/portfolio semantics, label, lag, and horizon specification.
Require exact feature lineage, lookbacks, availability, and train-only preprocessing rules.
Require data-specific nested chronological fold geometry and actual-label-interval purge rules.
Require an explicit geometry-dependent embargo applicability decision and duration only when applicable.
Require approved sample-adequacy thresholds and missing/no-trade return handling.
Require complete trial accounting and approved selection, DSR, PBO, frequency, and serial-correlation conventions.
Require approved L01-L06 and point-in-time data-quality blocking rules.
Require market-calibrated baseline fee, spread, impact, delay, borrow, participation, and capacity inputs with vintages.
Require predeclared all-cost and liquidity stress vectors plus promotion-blocking gates.
Require predeclared volatility, rate, crisis, and regime-dependency definitions.
Require approved computable position, exposure, turnover, volatility, loss, and drawdown limits.
Preserve the present immutable audit schema without treating it as policy or holdout evidence.
Require one selected-source/schema/calendar-bound contiguous unopened confirmation interval.
Require exact label-information boundaries and exclusion/purge rules around the confirmation interval.
Require label-blind exclusion, custodian, single-use consumption, and replacement/new-generation governance.
Require independent immutable approval records for the complete policy and unopened holdout definition.

transition_rules.definition: A requirements, plan, artifact, manifest, record, or file hash proves integrity only and cannot upgrade an input or satisfy reserved evidence.
MOCK_ONLY becomes PRESENT only through approved non-synthetic evidence for every required field.
MISSING becomes PRESENT only through one complete, strictly validated required-evidence set.
UNPROVEN becomes PRESENT only after independent verification of the exact operational scope.
STALE becomes PRESENT only after fresh currentness and version revalidation.
PRESENT degrades to STALE when currentness lapses or a bound source, product, schema, policy, or rights version changes.
A holdout definition requires exact source/schema/calendar binding while observation access, label access, opening, and consumption remain false.
A complete policy requires every applicable policy input and a reference to the separately frozen unopened holdout definition.
Step 3 remains ineligible until both reserved hashes exist and a separate bounded-external-action authorization is current.
A later source-plan step cannot start, complete, or grant authority while any predecessor is incomplete.
